name: Congressional Trading Copycat
description: Buy stocks that multiple members of Congress are purchasing, sell after a holding period.

setup.description: Track Congressional stock disclosures. When multiple members buy the same stock in the same week, enter a position.

entry.long: Buy when 2+ Congress members purchase the same stock within a 7-day window

filters.name: member_count
filters.description: Minimum number of Congress members buying

notes: Congressional trades are disclosed with a delay (up to 45 days by law). Backtest simulates buying on disclosure date, not trade date. This tests whether the PUBLIC signal still has alpha after the reporting delay.
